synthesizedInputs: spacing.scale: derived from observed paddings/gaps (8/16/24/32/48/64/96/128) — bizpro-hub.html declares an explicit 8-based ladder so this is the canonical scale

rounded.lg=24px: read from .app-card; rounded.xl=32px: read from #hero/.section bottom-corner; primary radius 16px is mode across cards (mosaic, mnav-card, ucnav-card, perk-card, plan-card, editorial cards, hero-hub-card, gnav-inner)

fallback font choice (Source Sans 3 / Inter at 900 with -0.045em ls) is inferred — the source code only specifies licensed Adobe Clean. The fallback rationale is documented in DESIGN.md § Font availability note.
notes: Authored manually as inverse-extract — NOT by /direct. The Adobe Acrobat Studio reference system was reverse-engineered into this spec so downstream stardust stages adopt it as the target.

The token contract (:root vocabulary expected by stardust prototype/migrate) is satisfied by the frontmatter `colors`, `typography`, `spacing`, `rounded` keys in DESIGN.md — see extensions.tokenContract for the explicit mapping.

headingFamily.name: Adobe Clean Display
headingFamily.stack: 'Adobe Clean Display', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif

bodyFamily.name: Adobe Clean
bodyFamily.stack: 'Adobe Clean', 'Adobe Clean Display', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif

scaleAudit._provenance: Acrobat scale: 96 → 80 → 56 → 48 → 24. Ratios are 96/80=1.20, 80/56=1.43, 56/48=1.17, 48/24=2.0 — not a single canonical modular scale. The system is deliberate per token, not ratio-derived.
scaleAudit.note: Token-swap-by-breakpoint, not clamp(). Each Title size has 3 fixed breakpoint values.

fallbackFontDecision.primary: Adobe Clean Display + Adobe Clean (license required, OTF files in assets/fonts/)
fallbackFontDecision.fallback: Source Sans 3 (preferred, Adobe open source) → Inter weight 900 with -0.045em letter-spacing → system-ui
fallbackFontDecision.rationale: Source Sans 3 shares Adobe Clean's humanist proportions and ships at weight 900; Inter 900 is denser at display sizes than typical Helvetica-family fallbacks. See DESIGN.md § Font availability note.

title-1.purpose: Hero H1 — "With great power comes great productivity."

title-2.purpose: Section H2s — "There's more to Acrobat than Acrobat," "Real teams. Real work. Real impact."

title-4.purpose: Mega-nav use-case titles, plan-card name, list-nav heading.

body-m.purpose: Default body copy, hero subcopy, section decks.

body-s.purpose: Plan-card billing line, list-nav items, plan features.

eyebrow.purpose: Category cue above section headlines, often paired with a 24×24 product icon at 8px gap.

spacing._source: designs/hub/styles/global/grid.css (gutter:8px, max:1920px) + offer-apps.css (#the-offer-apps padding 128px) + bizpro-hub.html:99-110 (--s2a-spacing scale)

grid.note: When using col-12 inside a 6-col grid (S/XS), CSS grid creates implicit columns which breaks col-3 siblings. Use `grid-column: 1 / -1` for full-width at small breakpoints.

borderRadius._source: Counted across designs/hub/styles/*.css — 16px dominates cards/mosaic/mnav-card/ucnav-card/perk-card/plan-card/editorial/hub-router-card/gnav-inner. 24px on .app-card. 32px on #hero bottom + #the-offer-apps bottom. 75px on pill CTAs. 999px on plan-trial.

patterns.name: hero-mosaic-converge
patterns.evidence: 5-col × 3-row image mosaic, scroll-pinned, converges from spread to tight (220–240vh pin)

patterns.name: scroll-scrubbed-text-reveal
patterns.evidence: [data-ta] line splits + progressive y-offset reveals between 90vh and 40vh

patterns.name: mega-nav-clip-morph
patterns.evidence: panel clip-path expands from gnav-pill geometry to viewport bottom

patterns.name: morphing-sticky-cta
patterns.evidence: 279×56 pill expands into full pricing modal via GSAP-driven width/height/content

patterns.name: editorial-bento-2up
patterns.evidence: two-card row tucked behind hero's 32px rounded bottom

patterns.name: card-grid-3up
patterns.evidence: mega-nav product grid, perks-row, hub-router carousel

patterns.name: section-bottom-rounded
patterns.evidence: 32px bottom corners on full-bleed sections to reveal next layer

patterns.name: card-dark-flip-hover
patterns.evidence: product-card and use-case card invert to #1a1a1a + white text on hover

systemComponents.name: global-nav
systemComponents.exampleBlock:
[logo + nav-links]
[apps-icon + sign-in pill]
systemComponents.treatment: Frosted-glass pill, fixed top, transparent over hero → opaque on scroll. Logo color flips with state. Mega-nav clip-path expands from this pill's geometry.

systemComponents.name: mega-nav-panel
systemComponents.treatment: Off-canvas dropdown panel triggered by gnav links. clip-path morph from pill geometry. 4 panes: Products (filter+grid), Use Cases (5-col cards), Solutions (3-col list+feature), Learn & Support (3-col list+stack).

systemComponents.name: mobile-nav-overlay
systemComponents.treatment: Hamburger-toggled overlay below gnav (z:99). clip-path expands from nav-pill shape. Logo slides off-screen during open.

systemComponents.name: site-footer
systemComponents.treatment: background: #000, white type. 5–6 column link grid on desktop, stacks mobile. Featured-product strip with 16px icons. Legal/social row at bottom. Optional large wordmark with clip-path-reveal on scroll.

systemComponents.name: sticky-cta-pill
systemComponents.treatment: Floating bottom-center 279×56 black pill. GSAP-morphs into a full pricing modal with 3 plan-cards + scrim. Single shape across pill and modal states.

motion.name: ease-emphasized
motion.purpose: Mega-nav clip-path morph, mobile-nav overlay expand. 0.48s standard.

motion.name: hero-mosaic-converge
motion.purpose: Hero signature: 5×3 image mosaic converges from spread positions to tight grid as the user scrolls.
motion.trigger: ScrollTrigger trigger=.hero-pin-spacer, start=top top, end=bottom bottom, scrub=0.8
motion.scrollDistance: 220–240vh pin spacer; 120–180vh of scroll drives the timeline
motion.loadIn: Chebyshev-distance ring ripple from center-top tile (col 3, row 1). Ring 0 (1 tile), Ring 1 (5), Ring 2 (9). Each ring: clipPath 'inset(50% round 16px)' → 'inset(0% round 16px)', stagger 0.1s/ring, duration 0.5s, ease power2.out.

motion.name: text-scrub-reveal
motion.purpose: Section-headline reveal — every Title 2 with [data-ta] uses this.
motion.mechanic: Lines slide up from a progressive y-offset to 0 simultaneously. Upper lines resolve first.
motion.groups: [data-ta-group] collects [data-ta] and [data-ta-unit] children in DOM order and assigns sequential offsets

motion.name: mega-nav-clip-expand
motion.purpose: Mega-nav panel grows from gnav-pill geometry to full viewport.
motion.stagger: Filters and cards animate in via mnav-item-in keyframes. Initial open: 0.20s base + 25–30ms per item. Tab switch: 0s base + 25ms stagger.

motion.name: sticky-cta-morph
motion.purpose: Pill expands into full pricing modal at bottom-center.

motion.name: card-flip-hover
motion.purpose: Product / use-case cards invert from #fff to #1a1a1a on hover.

motion.name: hub-router-accordion
motion.purpose: Hub-router carousel: 4-card flex row where the active card grows from 291px to ~491px and crossfades to dark.

motion.name: lenis-smooth-scroll
motion.warning: DO NOT load ScrollSmoother.min.js — collapses document height to 0. Lenis is the only smooth-scroll dependency.

motion.name: anim-enter-section
motion.purpose: bizpro-hub generic section reveal — opacity 0 + translateY(40px) → opacity 1 + translateY(0).
motion.trigger: Custom raf loop driven by Lenis scroll + getBoundingClientRect; trigger at 85% viewport, complete over 30vh.

_provenance.basis: Stage-2 authoring decision; see learnings G14 / open-question 2.

reducedMotion.policy: Motion is presentational, not load-bearing. Under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce, prototypes must produce the same final composition without scroll-pinned timelines, scrubbed reveals, or clip-path morphs. State-change transitions ≤200ms (hover, focus, button press) remain.
reducedMotion.authoringRule: Wrap any GSAP timeline / ScrollTrigger.create(...) registration in a matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)') guard so timelines don't initialize when the user has opted out.

collapseRules.hero-mosaic-converge: Render mosaic in final tight (0,0) positions on load; 200ms opacity fade-in. Skip the 220vh pin and the spread→tight ScrollTrigger timeline.
collapseRules.text-scrub-reveal: [data-ta] / [data-ta-group] lines render at full opacity and y:0 on first paint. Optional ≤150ms fade is acceptable but not required.
collapseRules.hub-router-accordion: Active card sizes to its expanded width instantly on selection; transition-duration: 0.
collapseRules.sticky-cta-morph: Pill expands to modal on tap with no GSAP scale/radius interpolation. Scrim appears at rgba(0,0,0,0.6) immediately.
collapseRules.mega-nav-clip-expand: Show expanded panel directly; skip the 0.48s clip-path cubic-bezier interpolation.
collapseRules.footer-wordmark-clip: Render at final 0% inset on first paint; do not animate the upward reveal.
collapseRules.lenis-smooth-scroll: Disabled. Native scroll only. Lenis self-disables under prefers-reduced-motion; verify the prototype does not override this default.
collapseRules.default-transition: Unchanged — 200ms feedback transitions are interactive, not presentational.
collapseRules.ease-emphasized: Unchanged where used as a state-change easing; only as a clip-morph driver does it collapse (see mega-nav-clip-expand).
collapseRules.ease-spring-out: Unchanged where used for ≤200ms feedback; collapses where used for the 600ms hub-router accordion (see hub-router-accordion).
collapseRules.anim-enter-section: Items render at final position/opacity on first paint; skip stagger and easeOut3 ramp.

vendorDependencies.name: gsap
vendorDependencies.purpose: Core animation library; powers hero, sticky-CTA, hub-router, mosaic.

vendorDependencies.name: lenis
vendorDependencies.purpose: Smooth-scroll wheel/touch — integrated with GSAP ticker.

vendorDependencies.name: ScrollSmoother
vendorDependencies.purpose: INTENTIONALLY NOT LOADED — collapses document height. Use Lenis instead.

tokenContract.description: Mapping from this DESIGN.md frontmatter onto stardust's :root token contract (token-contract.md). Downstream prototypes must expose these CSS custom properties on :root.

voice.heroHeadline: With great power comes great productivity.
voice.heroSubcopy: Do your best work faster with AI-powered document insights, secure collaboration, and professional content creation — all in one place.
voice.heroSubcopyAlt: Streamline the way you work, communicate, and transact business. Plus, get AI-powered assistance, APIs and integrations, and built-in security tools.
sectionHeadlines: There's more to Acrobat than Acrobat.
Work faster. No matter the work.
Real teams. Real work. Real impact.
Do it all with the power of Acrobat.
tile-tagline-samples: Take the pain out of campaigns.
tile-body-samples: Turn insights into action and accelerate your pipeline with AI-powered tools.
Quickly create and edit images, video, and audio with creative AI.
Draft, review, and manage contracts and compliance documents at scale.
Streamline hiring, onboarding, and employee communications with ease.
Ask your custom or prebuilt AI Assistant to quickly summarize, analyze, provide insights, turn docs into decks, and more.

tone.evidence: Single-clause headlines, periods inside section titles ('Real teams. Real work. Real impact.'), confident generosity, no jargon, no exclamation marks, em-dashes preferred over commas. Sentence case throughout.

anti_toolbox_hits.justification: Adobe Acrobat Studio DS canonical pattern (`#gnav` in designs/hub/index.html); the gnav is fixed-pill, frosted-glass on scroll, with mega-nav clip-morph from the same geometry. Source DS ships this; not a stardust default. See DESIGN.md § 5 Components / Navigation.

PARTIAL — present only as the editorial-bento left card (one stat figure + body), NOT a 3–4 number trust bar. Rendered as PLACEHOLDER per F-002 (semrush home has STATS AND FACTS H2 with no captured values; the brief flagged this as Open Question 2 / decision: keep as placeholder). The bento-left card is the source DS's editorial bento pattern, not a horizontal stat strip. Justification: a single stat-card is the source DS's editorial-bento composition, not a generic trust bar.

anti_toolbox_hits.move: Generic-2026-SaaS silhouette (oversized hero + CTA pair + sticky nav + serial footer)
anti_toolbox_hits.justification: FALSE-POSITIVE flagging — three of four elements are present (oversized hero at 80px Title 1, primary+secondary CTA pair, sticky top-nav) but the fourth (serial-marker footer) is absent. The composition is the source DS's exact hero pattern — Adobe Clean Display Black at 80px, primary+secondary pill pair, frosted-glass nav. Source DS justification, not stardust default.

anti_toolbox_hits.move: Hero text on photographic background without contrast scrim
anti_toolbox_hits.justification: Hero text sits at z-index 2 on white ground (#ffffff); the mosaic tiles are at opacity 0.18 behind, giving an effective text-on-near-white reading. Contrast computed at >7:1 (black-on-white) under the headline. The mosaic is decorative, not a photographic background — DESIGN.md § Hero specifies the mosaic-converge pattern with hero copy centered above on white ground.

Adobe DS hub-router accordion (5-up flex with active card expanding) and perks-4-up are explicit DS patterns named in DESIGN.md § 5 Components and DESIGN.json extensions.motifs.patterns[hub-router-accordion / card-grid-3up]. Source-DS-justified, not a stardust card-grid reflex.

audit_adjustments.reason: Single bento-left stat is not a horizontal multi-number trust bar; flagged as PARTIAL hit with PLACEHOLDER content treatment.

palette_source._note: Palette inherited from designs/hub/styles/global/reset.css + designs/bizpro-hub-prototype (1)/bizpro-hub.html — not seed-derived.

notes: Adopted direction: anti-toolbox audit pre-cleared by source DS (every hit Adobe Studio's DS makes is justified by the source itself, not by a stardust default).

Brand-faithful inversions allowed and documented: pure #000 / #fff (intentional Adobe DS choice — DESIGN.md § Colors The One Blue Rule + The Two-Gray Rule); hex format throughout (Adobe DS frontmatter ships hex); no clamp on Title sizes (DESIGN.md hard rule, token-swap-by-breakpoint via @media); em-dashes welcome (Adobe register samples ship them throughout).

components.name: Primary Button (Ink-Dark Pill)
components.description: The default site CTA — black pill on white. Use as the dominant action on every section. Hover deepens to #1a1a1a.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: #000; color: #fff; border: 0; border-radius: 75px; font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1a1a1a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b63fb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button (Outline Pill)
components.description: Always paired right of the primary; never alone. 1.5px hairline outline.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: transparent; color: #000; border: 1.5px solid #000; border-radius: 75px; font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.3; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b63fb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Trial CTA (Signature Blue)
components.description: Reserved per The One Blue Rule. Hero "Start free trial" + plan-trial pill in the sticky pricing modal. Never anywhere else.
components.css: .ds-btn-trial { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 0 24px; background: #3b63fb; color: #fff; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease, opacity 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-trial:hover { background: #274dea; }

components.name: Filter Pill (Mega-Nav)
components.description: Mega-nav category selector. Default 4% black; active flips to #000 with white type.
components.css: .ds-filter-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 40px; padding: 0 18px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); color: #1a1a1a; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-filter-pill:hover:not(.ds-filter-pill--active) { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-filter-pill--active { background: #000; color: #fff; }

components.name: Product Card (Mega-Nav)
components.description: Mega-nav 3-up product tile. Hover flips entire card to #1a1a1a with all text inverting.
components.html:
Acrobat

Quickly create, edit, sign, and manage your PDFs anywhere.
components.css: .ds-product-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-height: 160px; padding: 16px; background: #fff; border-radius: 16px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease; } .ds-product-card:hover { background: #1a1a1a; } .ds-product-card__top { margin-bottom: auto; } .ds-product-card__bottom { padding-top: 16px; } .ds-product-card__name { margin: 0 0 4px; font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.25; transition: color 200ms ease; } .ds-product-card__desc { margin: 0; font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.56); line-height: 1.45; transition: color 200ms ease; } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-card__name { color: #fff; } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-card__desc { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.64); }

components.name: Perk Card (4-up Grid)
components.description: 4-up perks grid below the app carousel. Flat tonal layering — no shadow, no border.
components.html:
Always up to date.

New features, ongoing improvements, and the latest AI tools — included.
components.css: .ds-perk-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; padding: 32px 24px; background: #f8f8f8; border-radius: 16px; } .ds-perk-card__title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Adobe Clean Display', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #2c2c2c; } .ds-perk-card__body { margin: 0; font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #4a4a4a; }

components.name: Section Eyebrow + Headline
components.description: Canonical section opener — eyebrow line + Title 2 headline. The eyebrow-headline pair rule.
components.html:
Customer Stories

Real teams. Real work. Real impact.

From small businesses to the world's largest enterprises, our customers use Acrobat to unleash their creativity.
components.css: .ds-section-header { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 20px; text-align: center; padding: 0 24px; max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; } .ds-eyebrow { margin: 0; font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #6e6e6e; } .ds-title-2 { margin: 0; font-family: 'Adobe Clean Display', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(32px, 4.375vw, 56px); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: #000; max-width: 16ch; } .ds-body-md { margin: 0; font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #4a4a4a; max-width: 44ch; }

components.name: Global Nav Pill
components.description: Top fixed pill that crossfades from invisible to frosted glass at >40px scroll. Logo + link colors flip in lockstep.
components.html:
ProductsUse CasesSolutionsPlans
Sign In
components.css: #ds-gnav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100; padding: 8px; } .ds-gnav-inner { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; padding: 0 16px; max-width: 1904px; margin: 0 auto; border-radius: 16px; } .ds-gnav-inner::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: -1; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.51); backdrop-filter: blur(64px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(64px); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.35s ease; pointer-events: none; } #ds-gnav.is-scrolled .ds-gnav-inner::before { opacity: 1; } .ds-gnav-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; height: 100%; } .ds-gnav-logo { color: #fff; transition: color 0.35s ease; } #ds-gnav.is-scrolled .ds-gnav-logo { color: #000; } .ds-gnav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; } .ds-gnav-links a { font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.35s ease, opacity 0.15s ease; } #ds-gnav.is-scrolled .ds-gnav-links a { color: #000; } .ds-gnav-links:has(a:hover) a { opacity: 0.65; } .ds-gnav-links:has(a:hover) a:hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-gnav-signin { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 40px; padding: 0 24px; background: transparent; color: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border-radius: 75px; font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; backdrop-filter: blur(16.5px); transition: color 0.35s ease, border-color 0.35s ease, background 0.2s ease; } #ds-gnav.is-scrolled .ds-gnav-signin { color: #000; border-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); } .ds-gnav-signin:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); }

components.name: Sticky CTA Pill (Compact State)
components.description: Floating bottom-center CTA pill. Compact pill state shown here; full modal expansion is GSAP-driven.
components.html: Start free trial
components.css: .ds-sticky-cta { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 102; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; height: 56px; padding: 0 16px 0 12px; background: #000; color: #fff; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.24), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-sticky-cta:hover { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-2px); } .ds-sticky-cta__icon { display: inline-flex; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-sticky-cta__label { font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.3; }

components.name: Hero Block (Mosaic-Convergence Ready)
components.description: Centered hero copy block — eyebrow with product icon, Title 1, body, CTA pair. Pair with the mosaic-converge motion pattern (handled in JS).

great productivity.

components.css: .ds-hero { position: relative; background: #fff; border-radius: 0 0 32px 32px; padding-top: 189px; min-height: 100vh; overflow: visible; } .ds-hero__text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 24px; text-align: center; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-hero__app-id { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-hero__title { margin: 0; max-width: 16ch; font-family: 'Adobe Clean Display', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(40px, 6.25vw, 80px); font-weight: 900; line-height: 0.96; letter-spacing: -0.04em; color: #000; } .ds-hero__body { margin: 0; max-width: 48ch; font-family: 'Adobe Clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #4a4a4a; } .ds-hero__ctas { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }

narrative.overview: Acrobat Studio is a marketing surface that earns the viewport. The page is mostly white. Type is enormous, set in Adobe Clean Display Black at 80–96px. Color is rationed: a near-black ink for buttons and emphasis, a pure white ground, two warm grays for cards and bento panels, a single signature blue (#3b63fb) reserved for 'Try it free,' and the Adobe red wordmark as a brand anchor. The design is motion-led — the hero pins for 220–240vh while a five-column image mosaic converges from a spread state into a tight 8px-gap grid; copy fades up, ScrollTrigger scrubs the timeline, Lenis smooths the wheel.
keyCharacteristics: White ground, near-black ink, surfaces in two warm grays only
Adobe Clean Display Black at 80–96px on the hero, dropping to 24px for tile titles
Type sizes are tokens, not clamps — desktop / tablet / mobile redefine the same names
Pill-shaped CTAs (75px or 999px radius), no rectangular buttons
16px is THE radius — cards, mega-nav panel bottom, mosaic tiles, product cards
32px rounded bottom on full-bleed sections so the next layer can peek through
Signature blue (#3b63fb) is for 'Try it free' and the plan-trial CTA only — never on chrome
Scroll-pinned hero (220vh+), scroll-scrubbed text reveals, GSAP + ScrollTrigger + Lenis vendored locally
Mega-nav opens via a clip-path expansion of the gnav pill — a single shape transforms across states

rules.name: The One Blue Rule
rules.body: The signature blue (#3b63fb) appears on exactly two elements site-wide: the hero 'Start free trial' button and the plan-trial pill in the sticky pricing modal. Anywhere else, the primary CTA is ink-dark on white.

rules.name: The Two-Gray Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are #f8f8f8 OR #f6f6f6 — never both in the same section, and never any other gray. Adding a third gray means the system has drifted.

rules.name: The Adobe-Red Reservation
rules.body: #eb1000 is the wordmark color. It is not a status color, an accent, a hover color, or a button color. It exists once on every page, in the logo, and nowhere else.

rules.name: The Black-900 Rule
rules.body: Every Title size in the scale is font-weight: 900. Adobe Clean Display Black is the only display weight in the system; never substitute Bold or Regular at headline sizes.

rules.name: The Eyebrow-Headline Pair Rule
rules.body: Section headlines are always preceded by an Eyebrow line at 16/700/-0.01em. The eyebrow is the category cue; the headline is the statement. Never start a section with a Title 2 alone.

rules.name: The Tightline Rule
rules.body: Display sizes (Title 1–4) use line-heights of 0.94–1.0. They are stacked, not airy. Body sizes use 1.2–1.3.

rules.name: The Glass-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Where a typical SaaS site would add a shadow to lift the nav off the page, this system uses a frosted-glass pill instead. Never add a box-shadow to the gnav.

rules.name: The One-Photo-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Use 0 4px 100px rgba(0,0,0,0.25) only on photographic images that need to lift off a colored backdrop. Don't reach for it on cards, buttons, or chrome.

dos: Do lead every section with an eyebrow at 16/700/-0.01em above the Title 2 headline.
Do use Adobe Clean Display Black (900) at 80–96px on the hero.
Do use 16px as the default radius — cards, mega-nav panel bottom, mosaic tiles, product cards. Use 24px only on app-carousel cards. Use 32px only on full-bleed section bottom corners.
Do rotate exactly two grays for surfaces: #f8f8f8 and #f6f6f6.
Do pin the hero for 220vh+ and scrub the mosaic convergence to scroll progress with scrub: 0.8.
Do apply the global Text Animator to every section headline using [data-ta] and [data-ta-group].
Do vendor GSAP, ScrollTrigger, and Lenis locally — these are required, not optional.
Do crossfade the gnav pill from invisible to frosted-glass at >40px scroll, with the logo and link colors flipping in lockstep.
donts: Don't add a box-shadow to the gnav. Use frosted glass instead.
Don't spread the trial-blue (#3b63fb) onto links, eyebrows, nav, or feature accents.
Don't use rounded-rectangle buttons. All CTAs are pill-shaped (75px or 999px).
Don't use clamp() on Title sizes. The system swaps fixed tokens at the breakpoint media queries.
Don't load ScrollSmoother.min.js. It collapses document height to 0 and breaks scroll. Use Lenis.
Don't add badge-soup, gradient hero backgrounds, or social-proof logo strips beneath the hero.
Don't use the Adobe red (#eb1000) anywhere except the wordmark.
Don't introduce text-transform: uppercase on body or eyebrow copy.
Don't use box-shadow on cards as a default lift. Cards live on tonal layering.
